About Us

Pakistan's Most Trusted Diet & Nutrition Complex

At LetsNutriate, we are proud to be the first complex in Pakistan offering such a comprehensive range of clinical nutrition services — all under one roof.

Our approach blends evidence-based science with deeply personalized care. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all diets. Every client receives a plan tailored to their body, goals, lifestyle, and culture.

  • Registered Clinical Dietitian & Nutritionist
  • Specialized in Hormonal & Metabolic Health
  • Expert in Weight Management & Anti-Aging Nutrition
  • Trained in Post-Partum Recovery Nutrition
  • Serving clients across all of Pakistan online
Our Team

A team dedicated to your transformation

Our Services

Clinical Nutrition Programs

Choose your health journey. Every plan includes personalized meal plans, 1-on-1 coaching, and WhatsApp support.

⚖️

Weight Management

Customized meal plans for healthy, sustainable weight loss or muscle gain — designed around your body and lifestyle.

1M — 8,000 PKR 3M — 21,000 PKR 6M — 38,400 PKR
🌿

Hormonal Reset

Clinical nutrition support for Thyroid, PCOS/PMOS, Hypertension, and Insulin Resistance through targeted food therapy.

1M — 10,000 PKR 3M — 25,500 PKR 6M — 45,999 PKR
✨

Anti-Aging Plan

Nourish your body from within. Science-backed plans to slow aging, boost energy, and sustain an active, vibrant life.

1M — 15,000 PKR 3M — 36,000 PKR 6M — 72,000 PKR
🤱

Post-Partum Weight Loss

Gentle, effective nutrition guidance specifically crafted for new mothers to recover, nourish, and feel themselves again.

1M — 10,000 PKR 3M — 24,000 PKR 6M — 45,000 PKR
